findings.description: The footnote hyperlink for 'Levee Terms & Definitions (army.mil)' lost its href. In the PDF (page 4 footnote), this text is a clickable hyperlink. In the HTML, it is rendered as underlined plain text (<u>) inside the footer with no <a href> tag, so the destination URL is lost.
findings.evidence: PDF footnote 1: 'Levee Terms & Definitions (army.mil)' appears as a blue/underlined hyperlink. HTML: '<u>Levee Terms & Definitions (army.mil)</u>' — no <a> wrapper, href is absent.
